lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਪੁਨਾ ਸਦਾ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਸੋਵਤ ਬੈਸਤ ਖਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: so prabh apunaa sadaa dhiaaeeai sovat baisat khaliaa |
lines.english: Meditate forever on your God, when you sleep and sit and stand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: gun nidhaan sukh saagar suaamee jal thal maheeal soee |
lines.english: The Lord and Master is the treasure of virtue, the ocean of peace; He pervades the water, the land and the sky.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jan naanak prabh kee saranaaee tis bin avar na koee |3|
lines.english: Servant Nanak has entered God's Sanctuary; there is no other than Him. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਘਰੁ ਬਨਿਆ ਬਨੁ ਤਾਲੁ ਬਨਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪਰਸੇ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: meraa ghar baniaa ban taal baniaa prabh parase har raaeaa raam |
lines.english: My home is made, the garden and pool are made, and my Sovereign Lord God has met me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਸੋਹਿਆ ਮੀਤ ਸਾਜਨ ਸਰਸੇ ਗੁਣ ਮੰਗਲ ਹਰਿ ਗਾਇਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: meraa man sohiaa meet saajan sarase gun mangal har gaaeaa raam |
lines.english: My mind is adorned, and my friends rejoice; I sing the songs of joy, and the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਧਿਆਇ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਗਲ ਇਛਾ ਪਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: gun gaae prabhoo dhiaae saachaa sagal ichhaa paaeea |
lines.english: Singing the Glorious Praises of the True Lord God, all desires are fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣ ਲਾਗੇ ਸਦਾ ਜਾਗੇ ਮਨਿ ਵਜੀਆ ਵਾਧਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur charan laage sadaa jaage man vajeea vaadhaaeea |
lines.english: Those who are attached to the Guru's Feet are always awake and aware; His Praises resound and resonate through their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸੁਖਹ ਗਾਮੀ ਹਲਤੁ ਪਲਤੁ ਸਵਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: karee nadar suaamee sukhah gaamee halat palat savaariaa |
lines.english: My Lord and Master, the bringer of peace, has blessed me with His Grace; He has arranged this world, and the world hereafter for me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੀਐ ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਧਾਰਿਆ ॥੪॥੪॥੭॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak nit naam japeeai jeeo pindd jin dhaariaa |4|4|7|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord forever; He is the Support of the body and soul. ||4||4||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਸਾਗਰੋ ਭੈ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਤਰਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: bhai saagaro bhai saagar tariaa har har naam dhiaae raam |
lines.english: The terrifying world-ocean, the terrifying world-ocean - I have crossed over it, meditating on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੋਹਿਥੜਾ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣ ਅਰਾਧੇ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਾਰਿ ਲਘਾਏ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: bohitharraa har charan araadhe mil satigur paar laghaae raam |
lines.english: I worship and adore the Lord's Feet, the boat to carry me across. Meeting the True Guru, I am carried over.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Soohee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੈ ਸੋਈ ਭਲ ਮਾਨਉ ਤਾ ਮਨੁ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh karai soee bhal maanau taa man sehaj samaanaa |
lines.english: Whatever He does, I accept as good, and my mind merges in celestial peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਤਰੀਐ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਮਰੀਐ ਚੂਕੈ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee tareeai bahurr na mareeai chookai aavan jaanaa |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, I cross over, and I shall not die again; my comings and goings are ended.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖ ਨ ਭੂਖ ਨ ਰੋਗੁ ਨ ਬਿਆਪੈ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰ ਸਰਣੀ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: dookh na bhookh na rog na biaapai sukh saagar saranee paae |
lines.english: Neither pain, nor hunger, nor disease afflicts me. I have found the Sanctuary of the Lord, the ocean of peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਮਨ ਕੀ ਚਿੰਤ ਮਿਟਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har simar simar naanak rang raataa man kee chint mittaae |1|
lines.english: Meditating, meditating in remembrance on the Lord, Nanak is imbued with His Love; his mind's anxieties are dispelled. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਸਾਜਨ ਵਸਗਤਿ ਕੀਨੇ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: sant janaa har mantru drirraaeaa har saajan vasagat keene raam |
lines.english: The humble Saints have implanted the Lord's Mantra within me, and the Lord, my Best Friend, has come under my power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਅਪੁਨੀ ਦਾਸੀ ਮਿਟੀ ਉਦਾਸੀ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਦਰਿ ਥਿਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kar apunee daasee mittee udaasee har mandar thit paaee |
lines.english: He has made me His hand-maiden and slave; my sadness is dispelled, and in the Lord's Temple, I have found stability.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਨੜਾ ਮਨੁ ਆਗੈ ਧਰਿਆ ਸਰਬਸੁ ਠਾਕੁਰਿ ਦੀਨੇ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: aapanarraa man aagai dhariaa sarabas tthaakur deene raam |
lines.english: I have dedicated my mind to my Lord and Master, and offered it to Him, and He has blessed me with everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦ ਬਿਨੋਦ ਸਿਮਰਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਵਿਛੁੜਿ ਕਬਹੂ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: anad binod simarahu prabh saachaa vichhurr kabahoo na jaaee |
lines.english: My joy and bliss are in meditating on my True God; I shall never be separated from Him again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਵਡਭਾਗਣਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੋਹਾਗਣਿ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਗੁਣ ਚੀਨੑੇ ॥
lines.translit: saa vaddabhaagan sadaa sohaagan raam naam gun cheenae |
lines.english: She alone is very fortunate, and a true soul-bride, who contemplates the Glorious Vision of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਰਵਹਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਮਹਾ ਰਸਿ ਭੀਨੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak raveh rang raate prem mahaa ras bheene |2|
lines.english: Says Nanak, I am imbued with His Love, drenched in the supreme, sublime essence of His Love. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਨੜੈ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਆਪਿ ਸੀਗਾਰੀ ਸੋਭਾਵੰਤੀ ਨਾਰੇ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: aapanarrai prabh aap seegaaree sobhaavantee naare raam |
lines.english: God Himself has embellished her, and she has become His virtuous soul-bride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦ ਬਿਨੋਦ ਭਏ ਨਿਤ ਸਖੀਏ ਮੰਗਲ ਸਦਾ ਹਮਾਰੈ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: anad binod bhe nit sakhee mangal sadaa hamaarai raam |
lines.english: I am in continual bliss and ecstasy, O my companions; I sing the songs of joy forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਸੁਭਾਇ ਭਏ ਕਿਰਪਾਲਾ ਗੁਣ ਅਵਗਣ ਨ ਬੀਚਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj subhaae bhe kirapaalaa gun avagan na beechaariaa |
lines.english: With natural ease, He has become Merciful to her. He does not consider her merits or demerits.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਠਿ ਲਗਾਇ ਲੀਏ ਜਨ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: kantth lagaae lee jan apune raam naam ur dhaariaa |
lines.english: He hugs His humble servants close in His Loving Embrace; they enshrine the Lord's Name in their hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਨ ਮੋਹ ਮਦ ਸਗਲ ਬਿਆਪੀ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਆਪਿ ਨਿਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: maan moh mad sagal biaapee kar kirapaa aap nivaare |
lines.english: Everyone is engrossed in arrogant pride, attachment and intoxication; in His Mercy, He has freed me of them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਭੈ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਤਰਿਆ ਪੂਰਨ ਕਾਜ ਹਮਾਰੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak bhai saagar tariaa pooran kaaj hamaare |3|
lines.english: Says Nanak, I have crossed over the terrifying world-ocean, and all my affairs are perfectly resolved. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲ ਜਨਮੁ ਹੋਆ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਏਕੰਕਾਰੁ ਧਿਆਏ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: safal janam hoaa mil saadhoo ekankaar dhiaae raam |
lines.english: Life becomes fruitful, meeting with the Holy Saints, and meditating on the One God, the Creator of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਨਿਤ ਸਖੀਹੋ ਸਗਲ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਪਾਏ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: gun gopaal gaavahu nit sakheeho sagal manorath paae raam |
lines.english: Continually sing the Glorious Praises of the World-Lord, O my companions; all your wishes shall be granted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮੋ ਪਸਾਰਾ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਸਰਿਆ ਸਭੁ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੀ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: brahamo pasaaraa braham pasariaa sabh braham drisattee aaeaa |
lines.english: God created it, and God spreads through it everywhere. Everywhere I look, I see God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਏਕ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਅਨੇਕ ਰਵਿਆ ਸਰਬ ਮੰਡਲਿ ਛਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jap ek prabhoo anek raviaa sarab manddal chhaaeaa |
lines.english: Chant, and meditate on the One God, who permeates and pervades the many beings of the whole Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਪੂਰਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨਾ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jal thal maheeal poor pooran tis binaa nahee jaae |
lines.english: The Perfect Lord is perfectly pervading and permeating the water, the land and the sky; there is no place without Him.
